schedule.heading: This is the room for the next step.
schedule.closingLine: If you can text, you can use AI.

facts.heading: The room is simple. The work is real.
facts.intro: No mystery, no tool-chasing, no jargon wall. Each live session turns one AI idea into one useful action.

items.title: Format
items.description: Free live knowledge sessions on Google Meet.

items.title: Rhythm
items.description: Weekly or biweekly sessions with reminders, replay access, and next steps.

items.title: Audience
items.description: Creators, parents, founders, professionals, students, coaches, athletes, and community builders.

rhythm.heading: What happens inside a knowledge session
rhythm.intro: Each session is built like a clean operator loop: Major explains the idea, shows a real example, then gives you one practical action to take before the next room opens.

items.title: A clear idea
items.copy: One mindset principle for the session.

items.title: A live example
items.copy: AI used in plain language for real work, business, content, or life.

items.title: A simple action
items.copy: One thing to try immediately after the session.

meetMajor.markAlt: Major AI Mindset MD crown seal
meetMajor.heading: Major Dream Williams helps people translate AI into real life, real business, and real legacy.
meetMajor.body: From the South Bronx to Wall Street, from blockchain to AI, Major teaches people how to stop being intimidated by technology and start using it to build.
meetMajor.quote: The hero is not AI. The hero is the human learning how to use it.

items.question: Do I need to know AI already?
items.answer: No. The sessions are built for beginners first. We use plain language and real examples.

items.question: Is this only for business owners?
items.answer: No. It is for anyone who wants to understand AI and start building with more confidence.

items.question: What happens after the session?
items.answer: You can join future sessions, book a discovery call, or move into a beginner lab when you are ready.

abc.intro: A calm learning path for people who want AI to become understandable, usable, and connected to real life.
abc.footerLine: Likkle by likkle, we build the future.

cards.details: Find the repeated task, the time leak, and the place where help is needed.
AI begins as communication. Plain language is enough to start.
The better you explain the situation, the better AI can support the work.
Do not collect tools. Build toward a useful result.
Run one small AI test, observe what changed, and improve the next attempt.
